human_actions_pending.context: Resumes from 28-UAT.md and walks pass/fail per item. May trigger phase.complete or open 28.1 gap-closure depending on results.

decisions.decision: Plan 28-03 winner is Variant A (V19D prompt few-shot alone, no Swift gate code)
decisions.rationale: 4-variant matrix on Gemma 4 E2B Q4_K_M: A=B=D agg_lev=44, C=53; A wins tiebreaker on latency 0.001ms and simplest implementation. No production gate code ships in CleanupService.swift.

decisions.decision: Plan 28-02 R1 regex LOCKED to (?:[A-Z](?![a-z])|[A-Z]{2,5}|[a-z][A-Z][a-zA-Z]{0,3}) after CR-01 fix
decisions.rationale: Original [A-Z][a-z]? accepted 1-2 char Title-Case prose bigrams (No one -> No1). Negative lookahead prevents the bigram mangle while preserving E one -> E1 and iOS seven -> iOS7.

decisions.decision: Apply relaxed D-14 scoring for contraction matrix due to DE harness template gap
decisions.rationale: Plan 28-01 only authored EN V19D harness templates. DE fixtures ran with EN prompts -> malformed LLM output but gate behavior verifiable independently (gate_recovered=0 for all DE across all variants). Documented in contraction_matrix_winner.md; future German V19D template would enable strict D-14.

decisions.decision: Phase 28 stays In Progress in ROADMAP until live UAT resolves
decisions.rationale: User chose multi-day observation over single-session test phrases. Verifier returned human_needed (5/5 code truths verified, 3 observation items deferred). Marking complete prematurely would lock in unverified production behavior.

next_action: Use /Applications/Dicticus.app normally for the next few days. When you have observations to report, run /gsd:verify-work 28 — it'll resume from 28-UAT.md and step through the 3 pending items. If anything misbehaves earlier, just describe what you saw and triage will route to the right fix path.
